title: Apps
heading: Apps & Games
intro: Discover games, mobile apps, developer tools, and digital products created by BarkinMad Studios for iPhone, iPad, macOS, and the web.

hero.alt: BarkinMad Studios games, mobile applications and software projects

description: Browse the growing BarkinMad Studios portfolio, from the connected ZX Series of retro-inspired arcade games to standalone mobile apps, developer tools, productivity software, and future projects.

content.heading: Mobile Apps, Games & Digital Products
paragraphs: Explore a growing collection of games, developer tools, mobile apps, prototypes, and software products designed for iPhone and iPad.
Every product is created with a focus on usability, performance, and long-term support, whether it's built for entertainment, productivity, or everyday problem solving.
From retro-inspired arcade games to practical software solutions, each project reflects BarkinMad Studios' commitment to creating reliable, enjoyable, and thoughtfully designed experiences.

content.heading: The ZX Series
paragraphs: The [ZX Series](/zx-series) is BarkinMad Studios' flagship collection of retro-inspired arcade games, combining classic gameplay with modern mobile features.

Supported games share systems such as achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, multiplayer features, progression, and future cross-game rewards, creating a connected arcade experience across the series.
Current and planned titles include [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong), and more games currently in development.

content.heading: Beyond Gaming
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios also develops practical mobile applications and software products, including score tracking tools, developer analytics platforms such as [StudioDash](/apps/studiodash), business utilities, prototypes, and productivity-focused software.
The experience gained from building commercial software and business systems directly influences the architecture, reliability, and user experience of every public application.
If you're looking for custom software or business solutions, explore our [software development services](/services) to learn more.

sections.title: ZX Series
sections.description: Explore the connected [ZX Series](/zx-series) of retro-inspired arcade games featuring achievements, leaderboards, [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series), multiplayer modes, shared progression, and a growing roadmap of future titles.

sections.title: Apps & Tools
sections.description: Browse standalone applications, developer tools, productivity software, score tracking apps, utilities, prototypes, and future projects created by BarkinMad Studios.
